name: Improper Handling of Windows Device Names
description: The product does not properly handle reserved Windows device names (AUX, CON, PRN, NUL, COM1-9, LPT1-9) in user-supplied pathnames, which Windows treats as device references regardless of directory or extension, potentially causing denial of service or unintended device access.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path containing reserved Windows device names that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that rejects or sanitizes reserved device names (AUX, CON, PRN, NUL, COM[1-9], LPT[1-9]) before file operations
